goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 14:45'.
The train should go to 'leicester' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'postcode', and 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 14:45
The train should go to leicester and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should be in the north
Make sure you get star of the hotel, postcode, and price range
